impact: Advances checkbox-148 by committing deterministic, redacted audit-export evidence that downstream reviewers can inspect without live crawl, authentication, browser artifacts, or official DevHub actions.
summary: Adds a fixture-only PP&D audit export scenario and focused unittest validation for human-review audit records.
target_task: Task checkbox-148: Task checkbox-148: Add a fixture-only audit export scenario plus focused validation that records source evidence, user-question decisions, redacted draft previews, guardrail outcomes, and refused official actions for downstream human review.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
